# ResumeForge

> A resume template marketplace with a browser-based editor and AI-powered resume optimizer. Browse ATS-optimized templates, customize in the editor, and land your dream job.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://mgis-resume-website-sigma.vercel.app/): Landing page with featured templates, how-it-works, and FAQ
- [Browse Templates](https://mgis-resume-website-sigma.vercel.app/browse): Filterable catalog of all resume templates by industry and experience level
- [AI Optimizer](https://mgis-resume-website-sigma.vercel.app/optimizer): Upload a resume and a job description to get tailored rewrite suggestions, keyword gap analysis, and a cover letter draft

## Templates

Every template is tested against Workday, Greenhouse, and Lever to ensure ATS compatibility. Customers receive PDF and DOCX exports.

## Key facts

- 500+ templates available
- Both free and paid templates (paid $18–$29)
- Editor supports drag-and-drop section reordering, font/color customization, and real-time preview
- AI Optimizer analyzes resumes for keyword match, impact, and missing skills against a target job description
- Payments processed via Stripe; orders stored in Supabase

## Contact

Code repository: https://github.com/Snoe0/mgis-resume-website
